query_normalized: predicting gene regulatory network dynamics from time-series rna-seq data biology
rationale: This paper qualifies as a foundational methodology reference (criterion d) by outlining the statistical modelling frameworks (deterministic/stochastic) and biological processes required for GRN inference, which is essential background for a literature review on predicting GRN dynamics. It also addresses the same domain variables (gene expression data and network topology) as the user's question (criterion b).
